title: Cross Version Optimization Client modpack[跨版本优化客户端整合包]
description:
该整合包有例如Tweakeroo，铁氧体磁芯等模组。增添了Via系模组以实现跨版本功能，这样就不用切换游戏版本了。
This integration package includes modules such as Tweakeroo and ferrite cores. Added ViaFabric and ViaBackwards to achieve cross version functionality, eliminating the need to switch game versions.
body:
# 命名规则：[模组加载器][版本][比常规增添的mod]-名称

### 生电优化整合包 ~~目前仅支持1.20.1Fabric~~

一个关于**生电优化**的整合包，免去生电里不必要的麻烦，例如
> - 一键丢出箱子中所有物品（_Tweakermore_+_Item Scroller_）
> - 照着视频做机器时放置错误导致的炸膛（_Litematica_）

不止如此，甚至可以：
> - 跨版本（_ViaFabric_+_ViaBackwards_）
> - 自动钓鱼（_XPlus Autofish_）
> - 一键执行指定命令（_Command Macros_）

相信这些模组一定能够帮到您！
***
### Redstone optimistic modpack ~~currently only supporting 1.20.1Fabric~~

An modpack for **redstone power generation**, eliminating unnecessary troubles in power generation, such as
>- One click throw out all items in the chest (_Tweakermore_+_Item Scroller_)
>- Explosion caused by incorrect placement of the machine according to the video (_Litematica_)

Not only that, but it can even:

>- Cross version (_ViaFabric_+_ViaBackwards_)
>- Automatic Fishing (_XPlus Autofish_)
>- One click execution of specified commands (_Command Macros_)

I believe these mods can definitely help you!
